title: Welcome And File Menu
description: Electron desktop host concern — **Welcome And File Menu**. Local mode bootstraps an SDK host context (`createSdkContext`) in the main process and exposes IPC-backed ports; remote mode reuses the HTTP client stack. Entry flows use the shared `@specd/ui` project chooser to open a local project folder or connect to a remote API.
context: Electron desktop host concern — **Welcome And File Menu**. Local mode bootstraps an SDK host context (`createSdkContext`) in the main process and exposes IPC-backed ports; remote mode reuses the HTTP client stack. Entry flows use the shared `@specd/ui` project chooser to open a local project folder or connect to a remote API.

rules.requirement: welcome offers local open and remote connect
rules:
First run MUST show the shared project chooser with local workspace and remote API options.
The File menu MUST expose a single `Open SpecD Project...` command that opens the same chooser rather than separate local and remote entries.
Within that chooser, remote configuration MUST open in a secondary dialog and local opening MUST trigger the native directory picker.

Opening the chooser from the File menu while a project is already mounted MUST keep the current session visible in the background.
The current session MUST remain active until the newly selected local workspace or remote connection has been validated successfully.

rules.requirement: recent connections are reachable from the menu
rules: File menu MUST list recent local paths and remote profiles from `studio-desktop:recent-connections`.

scenarios.requirement: welcome offers local open and remote connect
scenarios.name: Welcome shows open folder and remote chooser actions
then: local open and remote connect controls are visible

scenarios.requirement: welcome offers local open and remote connect
scenarios.name: File menu opens the shared chooser
given: the desktop window is already open
when: the user selects Open SpecD Project... from the File menu
then: AND there are no separate File menu entries for local and remote flows

scenarios.requirement: welcome offers local open and remote connect
scenarios.name: Welcome opens remote dialog on demand
when: AND the user chooses the remote action
then: URL and token fields become available in a secondary dialog
AND Test Connection runs health check

scenarios.requirement: welcome offers local open and remote connect
scenarios.name: Successful local open dismisses welcome
Opening chooser does not discard current session
given: a project is already open in the desktop host
when: the user opens Open SpecD Project...
then: the current project remains visible behind the chooser
AND it is not closed immediately

scenarios.name: Failed replacement keeps current session
given: a project is already open in the desktop host
when: the user attempts to switch projects and the new local or remote target fails validation
then: AND the chooser reports the failure without forcing a close

scenarios.requirement: recent connections are reachable from the menu
scenarios.name: File menu lists recent hosts

scenarios.requirement: recent connections are reachable from the menu
scenarios.name: Menu recents match welcome list

scenarios.requirement: recent connections are reachable from the menu
scenarios.name: Empty recents hides submenu items
